elements.name: intro
elements.html:
Teaching {module} Self-paced Online Professional Learning

Post-Module Survey

Code.org relies on surveys as a crucial tool to stay connected to teachers, gather feedback about our curriculum and your teaching experience, and to improve our programs.

Privacy and Confidentiality

  • Your individual responses here are completely confidential.
  • Your identity will never be revealed publicly or used to tie any responses back to you personally.
  • We may share anonymous, aggregate data (representing all responses) publicly.
  • Your anonymized responses will be used by Code.org for program improvement.

Your honesty and candor are appreciated.

Teaching {module}: Post-Module Survey

elements.name: section1_goals
elements.html: The questions in this section aim to understand your experience with the Teaching {module} self-paced professional learning module.

elements.name: comfort_supporting_students_learn
elements.title: After completing this module, I am more comfortable in my ability to support students [INSERT LEARNING OBJECTIVES]
elements.natalia_comment: EDIT TEXT TO INCLUDE THE LEARNING OBJECTIVE(S) OF THE CURRICULUM. E.g. I am more comfortable in my ability to support students in understanding computer vision concepts

elements.name: know_what_students_learn
elements.natalia_comment: INCLUDE ONLY if module is about one CURRICULUM (instead of one unit, if so use know_what_students_learn_module instead)

elements.name: know_what_students_learn_module
elements.natalia_comment: INCLUDE ONLY if module is about one UNIT (instead of one complete curriculum, if so use know_what_students_learn instead)
